questions.question: Why is the spine-leaf architecture preferred over the three-tier model for modern cloud data centers? (3 marks)
keyPoints: Easier linear scalability (scale by adding spines/leaves)
Eliminates bandwidth bottlenecks at the aggregation layer

questions.question: Discuss the role of virtualization and software-defined principles (like SDN) in enabling the efficient operation and management of large-scale cloud data centers. (5 marks)
keyPoints: Virtualization abstracts hardware, enabling resource pooling and high utilization.
It allows for flexible allocation of compute resources across physical hosts.
SDN separates control and data planes, enabling centralized network management.
This combination allows for automation of provisioning, scaling, and healing.
It leads to a software-defined data center (SDDC) where infrastructure is managed programmatically.
